---
type: meeting
---

# meeting
A call or conversation, captured. Frontmatter carries the date and `attendees:` (relative-markdown
edges to the `person` notes present, so they survive a split). The body is the **enriched, linked**
record — shorthand expanded, entities resolved and linked; the verbatim notes are kept in a `## Raw`
section in-file (a recording or live Doc is usually mutable, so prefer in-file raw — `CLAUDE.md` §7). A
meeting is a hub: it **feeds the `## Timeline`** of the people and subjects it touches (attendees or
explicitly-linked subjects — not incidental mentions, `CLAUDE.md` §8), and the decisions and tasks
extracted from it link back to it.
